summary: Tested P0 (Celebration Bundles) and P1 (PDF Download/Checklists) fixes. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend verification confirms bundles are displaying correctly from API and checklist download button is functional.
critical_code_review_comments: celebrate_routes.py: GET /api/celebrate/bundles correctly returns 6 new bundles from celebrate_bundles collection
checklist_routes.py: GET /api/checklists/all/available returns all 14 checklists across pillars
ChecklistPDF.jsx: Font issue fixed - using 'Helvetica' (built-in) instead of 'Inter' for mobile compatibility
ChecklistDownloadButton.jsx: Properly fetches checklists from /api/checklists/{pillar} endpoint
CuratedBundles.jsx: Fetches from /api/{pillar}/bundles - console logs confirm 'Using API bundles: 6'
seed_data_creation: Verified: 6 celebration bundles seeded in celebrate_bundles collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 and P1 fixes verified. Celebration bundles API returns 6 bundles (First Birthday Special, Premium Bark-day Bash, Pawty Essentials, Senior Celebration, Adoption Anniversary, New Puppy Welcome). Checklist API returns 14 checklists across all pillars. PDF font issue fixed using Helvetica instead of Inter.

p0_celebration_bundles.frontend_display: PASS - Console logs show: '[CuratedBundles] API response: {bundles: Array(6)}' and '[CuratedBundles] Using API bundles: 6'
p0_celebration_bundles.bundles_visible: PASS - All 6 bundles found in page content

p1_checklist_download.dropdown_menu: PASS - Dropdown shows 'Welcome Home Kit' and 'First Vet Visit Prep' options
